description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was parallel parked along the right curb on southbound Laguna Street between Ellis Street and Cleary Ct in 
San Francisco. An e-scooter rider, traveling south, was riding the e-scooter on the right curb and appeared to have let go of it. The 
unoccupied e-scooter then struck the rear right side of the Zoox vehicle, causing minor damage to the Zoox vehicle. No injuries were 
reported, and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
